name: Snowplow (Open Analytics)
description: Event pipeline: collectors (Scala stream, BDP, micro), Iglu, and tracker endpoints.
methodology: Collectors are almost always org-specific subdomains or paths (e.g. /com.snowplowanalytics.snowplow/tp2). Add your collector FQDNs as patterns (e.g. [^/]*collector\.example\.com/.*). Inspect payload schema versions and contexts for PII. Micro/staging collectors often differ from prod.
